tender.description: Renewal work by SDBC on the following motor roads under Mussoorie Constituency of Dehradun District under Annual Repair 2026-27. (i) Dehradun-Mussoorie motor road in km 23 and 25. (ii) Tehri Bus Stand-Bataghat road in Km 1 to 4.
